channel.title: Posts on GxbNt Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on GxbNt Notes

item.title: Cross-Session Hijack in an MCP-over-SSE Flow
item.description: A session routing flaw in an MCP-over-SSE server allowed one authenticated session to receive responses meant for another session.

item.title: Who Am I
item.description: I am Bishal (GxbNt), and I do security research.
